scripts.build:wasm: RUSTFLAGS='-C target-feature=+simd128,+relaxed-simd' cargo build -p marian-worker-wasm --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && mkdir -p dist && cp ../target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/marian_worker_wasm.wasm dist/
scripts.deploy: npm run build:wasm && npx wrangler deploy --config wrangler.jsonc
